text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the spring Tenno Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfazed by the grand arena before her, Mayano
Top Gun heads off to have a fun race—as she
always does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While she's making her way to the paddock...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I learn that, after this race, Narita Brian is
planning to enter a lengthy training period before
the Arima Kinen.
